# Right Track Physiotherapy & Performance Centre

> Evidence-based physiotherapy, sports rehabilitation, and clinical Pilates in Nicosia, Cyprus. GESY-registered healthcare provider.

## About
Right Track is a physiotherapy and performance centre founded by Antonis Petri. We specialize in helping athletes and individuals recover from injuries and improve their physical performance using evidence-based methods.

## Services
- Physiotherapy (GESY registered)
- Athlete-centred Rehabilitation
- Clinical Pilates
- Performance Training
- Home-care Physiotherapy
- Sports & Remedial Massage

## Team
- Antonis Petri - Lead Clinician & Founder, BSc Physiotherapy (Semmelweis University), Stanford-certified in Healthcare Ecosystems and Communication (Stanford Online, 2026), Diploma in Orthopaedic Manual Therapy, Clinical Instructor in the Department of Life and Health Sciences at Frederick University
- Alice Kazanjian - Physiotherapist & Clinical Pilates Instructor, BSc Physiotherapy, 8+ years experience

## Location
Tseriou 32
Strovolos 2042
Nicosia, Cyprus

## Hours
Monday - Friday: 08:00 - 20:00
Saturday: 09:00 - 14:00
Sunday: Closed

## Contact
- Email: righttrackphysio@gmail.com
- Website: https://righttrackphysio.com.cy
- Booking: https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/booking.html

## Careers / We're Hiring
Right Track is currently hiring a **Physiotherapist** in Nicosia, Cyprus (full-time).
- Focus: sports & performance rehabilitation (the clinic's core direction), plus neurological rehabilitation and home-based care
- Compensation: a guaranteed base salary that grows with your caseload (per-visit bonus) plus paid home visits with fuel support — realistic net earnings up to €1,800+/month
- Requirements: licensed or eligible to practise physiotherapy in Cyprus; driver's licence and vehicle strongly preferred for homecare visits
- Perks: branded kit provided, a supportive boutique-clinic team, and genuine room to grow into sports rehab and professional visibility
- Full details, an interactive income calculator, the hiring process and the application form are on the vacancy page.
- Apply (EN): https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/physiotherapist-job-nicosia.html
- Apply (Greek): https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/physiotherapist-job-nicosia-el.html

## Expertise
All clinical content is written and reviewed by licensed physiotherapists with active clinical practice in Cyprus. Antonis Petri holds a Stanford certificate in Healthcare Ecosystems and Communication (Stanford Online, 2026), is a Clinical Instructor in the Department of Life and Health Sciences at Frederick University, and works with professional athletes across multiple sports. His Stanford training in evidence-based health communication ensures that complex medical information is translated into clear, actionable patient guidance.

## Blog — Evidence-Based Articles
Available in English and Greek. Base URL: https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/

### Sports Injuries & Rehabilitation
- [ACL Tears: What 90% of Athletes Get Wrong About Recovery](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/acl-recovery-athletes-cyprus.html)
- [Why Stretching Alone Won't Fix Your Hamstring](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/hamstring-injury-stretching-myth.html)
- [From Torn Meniscus to Match Day: A Footballer's Recovery Story](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/meniscus-tear-recovery-case-study.html)
- [Why Your Ankle Sprain Keeps Coming Back](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/ankle-sprain-rehabilitation-guide.html)
- [Shoulder Impingement: The Injury That Doesn't Care If You're an Athlete](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/shoulder-impingement-treatment-guide.html)
- [Injury Prevention for Combat Sports: What Every Fighter Must Know](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/injury-prevention-combat-sports.html)
- [Joint Replacement Rehabilitation: What Most Patients Get Wrong](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/joint-replacement-rehabilitation-cyprus.html)
- [Calf Strain (Tennis Leg): Why It Happens & How to Come Back](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/calf-strain-gastrocnemius-treatment-cyprus.html)
- [Frozen Shoulder: Why It Happens, How Long It Lasts & What Speeds Recovery](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/frozen-shoulder-treatment-cyprus.html)

### Running & Padel
- [The 5 Exercises Every Runner Should Be Doing](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/runner-injury-prevention-exercises.html)
- [Padel Elbow: Causes, Prevention & Treatment](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/padel-elbow-causes-prevention-treatment.html)
- [The Complete Warm-Up Guide for Padel Players](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/padel-warmup-guide.html)
- [Padel Injury Survey in Cyprus: Findings from 50+ Players](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/padel-injury-survey-cyprus-findings.html)

### Common Conditions
- [Sciatica: The Complete Guide to Diagnosis, Treatment & Recovery](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/sciatica-treatment-guide-cyprus.html)
- [Lower Back Pain: Why It's So Common and What Actually Helps](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/lower-back-pain-treatment-cyprus.html)
- [Knee Pain After 40: When It's Arthritis and When It's Not](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/knee-pain-after-40-arthritis-physiotherapy.html)
- [Neck Pain & Headaches: How Physiotherapy Solves What Painkillers Can't](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/neck-pain-headaches-physiotherapy-nicosia.html)
- [Office Ergonomics: Why Your Desk Setup Is Causing Pain](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/office-ergonomics-neck-back-wrist-pain.html)
- [Physiotherapy After a Car Accident in Cyprus: What You Need to Know](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/physiotherapy-after-car-accident-cyprus.html)
- [When to See a Physio vs When to Wait It Out](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/when-to-see-physiotherapist.html)

### GESY & Healthcare in Cyprus
- [GESY Physiotherapy in Cyprus: Everything You Need to Know in 2026](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/gesy-physiotherapy-cyprus-guide.html)
- [GESY vs Private Physiotherapy: Costs, Wait Times & What's Covered](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/gesy-vs-private-physiotherapy-prices-cyprus.html)

### Sports Culture
- [From a Drunken Bet to a Global Religion: 48 Years of Ironman](https://righttrackphysio.com.cy/pages/blog/ironman-history-antarctic-triathlon.html)
